razac.title: Engineering & Support Manager
area1_items: 20+ repositories in Azure DevOps organized by domain (Core, Cadastros, Integrations, Financial, Processes, AI)
Shared libraries via internal NuGet feed (razac-libs)
Stack: .NET 8, Oracle (Dapper/ODP.NET), MongoDB, RabbitMQ, Docker, API Gateway, Identity Server
CI/CD with Azure Pipelines — automated NuGet publishing with change detection
Static analysis and quality gates with SonarQube
area2_items: PO collaboration: epic breakdown, user stories, acceptance criteria, test scenarios
Jira roadmap management: epics, stories, estimates, prioritization
Technical lead on Tax Analysis MVP — .NET backend + Railway frontend + LLM integration
area3_items: Bug and incident backlog management (Jira project TEC)
Production debugging with Loki, Grafana, RabbitMQ, Oracle, MongoDB
Support knowledge base for faster diagnosis and client response
Service health monitoring via Consul and Portainer
area4_items: Generative AI adoption in engineering workflows (Claude Code with MCPs for Jira, Loki, Grafana, RabbitMQ, Oracle, MongoDB, Azure DevOps)
MVP development and deployment on Railway

kestraa.title: Project Manager
items: Deployed solution in major agribusiness multinational
SAP MM module integration (ME21N, J1B1N, FB60)
Foreign trade import processes for container/bulk cargo

sinerlog.title: Technical Product Owner
items: Built e-Invoice system for cross-border retail (SGS integration)
Created Global Tracking and Sinerlog Courier apps
Implemented Brazil's Remessa Conforme program — clearing hundreds of international parcels through the federal tax benefit for couriers

correios.title: Cross-Border Technical Account Manager
items: 14 years progressing from operations to cross-border e-commerce leadership
Cainiao (Alibaba Group) — Technical account manager for Brazil's largest inbound cross-border flow: API integration, delivery SLA governance, and tracking system support
Shopee (Sea Group) — Helped launch cross-border import operation in Brazil, integrating Shopee's tracking systems with Correios infrastructure
Encaminhei.com — Led self pick-up point project for last-mile delivery optimization across São Paulo
Developed Correios PACKET — import solution processing thousands of international e-commerce parcels, including JSON API documentation
Managed 300+ corporate client portfolio with delivery SLA monitoring and API integration maintenance
Coordinated with GRU airport customs and Curitiba hub to resolve cross-border clearance bottlenecks
